description.text: Bring your best blocks and finish the job! This arena establishes base building 101. One Base.

es.original: Bring your best blocks and finish the job! This arena establishes base building 101. One Base.
es.translation:
Usa este escenario para aprender a construir.
Un núcleo.

fr.original: Bring your best blocks and finish the job! This arena establishes base building 101. One Base.
fr.translation: Ramenez vos meilleurs blocs et finissez le travail ! Une arène parfaite pour découvrir les bases de la construction. Une base.

de.original: Bring your best blocks and finish the job! This arena establishes base building 101. One Base.
de.translation: Bringt eure besten Blöcke mit! In dieser Arena kriegt ihr einen Grundkurs im Bauen. Eine Basis.

ru.original: Bring your best blocks and finish the job! This arena establishes base building 101. One Base.
ru.translation: Бери свои лучшие блоки и заканчивай начатое. На этой арене ты пройдешь курс молодого строителя. Одна база.

pt.original: Bring your best blocks and finish the job! This arena establishes base building 101. One Base.
pt.translation: Traga seus melhores blocos de teste e termine o trabalho! Esta arena apresenta os fundamentos da construção de bases. Uma base.
